title: Multi-channel allowance without double-allow errors
prompt: Write `lib/my_app_web/channels/multi_channel.ex` where a user joins two channels sequentially (`room:lobby` then `room:general`). Both channels must have sandbox allowance. Write a shared helper `allow_ecto_sandbox/1` that: (1) extracts metadata from `socket.assigns.phoenix_ecto_sandbox`, (2) calls `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow(metadata, Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox)`, (3) is idempotent (calling twice does not error). Each channel's `join/3` calls `allow_ecto_sandbox(socket)` as its first line.
tier_rationale: Multi-channel pattern — requires thinking about idempotence of allow.
